channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Five Soldiers, Including a Major, Martyred in Balochistan’s Barkhan During Anti-Terror Operation
item.description: In a significant operation in Barkhan district of Balochistan, Pakistan Army and Frontier Corps successfully engaged members of Fitna al Hindustan, resulting in the elimination of seven terrorists. Un...

item.title: Plaid Cymru Forms First Welsh Government Under Rhun ap Iorwerth
item.description: Rhun ap Iorwerth has announced his ministerial team as Wales prepares for its first Plaid Cymru-led government. Sioned Williams has been appointed deputy first minister, while former presiding officer...

item.title: Dr Gikonyo Clarifies His Medical Role in Gachagua’s Hospitalisation During Impeachment
item.description: In Nairobi, Dr Daniel Gikonyo, a cardiologist, has denied claims that he sheltered former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua in hospital during the impeachment proceedings to shield him from Senate scr...

item.title: Trump Visits China Amid Stalled Iran Ceasefire and Rising Middle East Tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump has arrived in China as negotiations for a ceasefire with Iran remain stalled, amid escalating tensions in the Middle East. Trump is expected to urge Chinese President Xi Jin...

item.title: Ex-Power Minister Saleh Mamman Sentenced to 75 Years for Diverting ₦33.8 Billion Meant for Power Projects
item.description: Abeg, Federal High Court wey dey Abuja don sentence former Minister of Power, Saleh Mamman, to 75 years prison after e find am guilty of fraud and money laundering involving about ₦33.8 billion wey su...

item.title: Historical Inequities Drive Detroit’s Water Affordability Challenges
item.description: Starting in July 2026, Detroit residents will face higher water and sewer rates, with increases of 5.8% and 4.26%, respectively, following similar hikes in 2025. These rises exacerbate an already seve...

item.title: Ex-SANDF member jailed for 25 years for murdering his wife at Westville pub
item.description: The Durban High Court has sentenced Frederick Nicolaas Le Roux, a former member of the South African National Defence Force's Special Forces, to an effective 25 years behind bars for the murder of his...

item.title: Senate Locked Down Amid Gunshots; Bato dela Rosa Faces ICC Warrant
item.description: On May 13, 2026, the Senate of the Philippines experienced a tense situation as gunshots were reported in the building while Senator Bato dela Rosa was inside to avoid arrest following an Internationa...

item.title: Tata Motors' Domestic Vehicle Growth May Help Offset Jaguar Land Rover Margin Challenges in Q4
item.description: Tata Motors is set to release its March quarter results, with analysts forecasting strong performance from its domestic passenger vehicle (PV) segment. The growth is expected to be driven by a 37% inc...

item.title: Everyday Life in 1960s Mallorca Through 30 Vintage Photographs
item.description: In the 1960s, Mallorca underwent a significant transformation from a quiet Mediterranean island to a popular European holiday destination. With its stunning beaches, rugged mountains, and sunny climat...

item.title: Dodoma Jiji defeat Yanga, keeping Simba SC in title hunt
item.description: In a dramatic turn of events in the Mainland Tanzania Premier League, Dodoma Jiji FC handed Young Africans (Yanga) their first league defeat in 42 matches, winning 3-2 at the Airtel Stadium. Yanga sta...

item.title: Labour faces three-way leadership contest as Streeting and Miliband prepare challenges
item.description: Labour is on the brink of a significant internal struggle, with Health Secretary Wes Streeting set to challenge Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer for party leadership. This move has been described as po...

item.title: Notable Blonde Actresses in Their 40s Who Are Still Shining in 2026
item.description: Blonde hair has always been a standout feature in Hollywood, and even as actresses hit their 40s, many continue to set trends and remain relevant in the entertainment industry. This article highlights...

item.title: PDP Faction Led by Kabiru Turaki Forms Alliance With APM Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: The Kabiru Turaki-led faction of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) don announce say dem don form alliance with the Allied Peoples Movement (APM) as dem dey prepare for the 2027 general elections. Ini...

item.title: Philippine agencies strengthen water management as El Niño approaches
item.description: The National Irrigation Administration (NIA) in the Ilocos region has stepped up efforts to manage water resources and monitor irrigation systems ahead of the expected El Niño phenomenon. Key measures...

item.title: Diana Markosian recreates intimate moments with her ex-partner using an actor to process heartbreak
item.description: Photographer Diana Markosian has explored the emotional aftermath of a breakup in her latest project, Replaced, currently on exhibition at Gallerie d’Italia in Turin, Italy. After her relationship end...

item.title: President Asif Ali Zardari honours distinguished personalities with civil awards at Aiwan-e-Sadr
item.description: Islamabad: On Wednesday, President Asif Ali Zardari conferred civil awards upon numerous worthy personalities including Pakistani nationals and some foreigners for their remarkable services in differe...

item.title: Beijing Residents Express Opposition to Trump Seeking Chinese Help on Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump arrived in China on May 13, 2026, ahead of a highly anticipated summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping. Reports indicate that Trump intends to seek Beijing's assistance in pre...

item.title: UK households see record drop in wealth due to rising living costs and global uncertainty
item.description: UK households have experienced a substantial decline in wealth, with average estimated wealth falling by 17.5% from £126,482 in 2025 to £104,329 in 2026, according to a St James’s Place survey of 6,00...

item.title: Explaining CGT and negative gearing reforms: How new builds will be prioritised
item.description: The Albanese government’s 2026 budget introduces changes to Australia’s housing tax system, aiming to encourage investment in newly built homes while limiting incentives for buying established propert...
